diagrams.title: fseek() Function Parameters
diagrams.description: Shows how fseek() uses offset and origin to position file pointer
diagrams.purpose: Understanding fseek() mechanics and calculating positions

diagrams.title: Random Access File Record Layout
diagrams.description: Diagram showing fixed-size records stored consecutively in a file with their byte offsets
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how records are stored and accessed directly

diagrams.title: File Operations Sequence for Finding File Size
diagrams.description: Step-by-step visualization of using fseek() and ftell() to determine file size
elements: Step 1: File open in binary mode
Step 2: fseek(fp, 0, SEEK_END) moves to end
Step 3: position = ftell(fp) gives file size in bytes
Step 4: rewind() or fseek(0,SEEK_SET) to reset
diagrams.purpose: Learning the standard method to find file size
